name: Passover Hermit Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the instant coffee into the cake mix.
2. Break the egg and add it to a measuring cup.
3. Add the peanut oil and liquid (water or orange juice) to measure 1/2 Cup.
4. Mix as directed on the package.
5. Fold in the raisins and nuts.
6. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour.
7. Drop by teaspoonful onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 15 minutes at 300°F.
